core_arc: Child goes on a trip or outing with family members.

personalisation_slots.NAME: Child's first name
personalisation_slots.DESTINATION: Where they go — the beach, the zoo, the farm, the park

scenes.outline: 'Today we are going to [DESTINATION]!' said [FAMILY_MEMBER]. [NAME] was so excited.
[NAME] got ready quickly. They packed a bag. They could not wait to go!
scenes.illustration_brief: [NAME] getting ready, packing a bag, eager to leave.

scenes.outline: They arrived at [DESTINATION]. It was amazing! [NAME] looked all around.
scenes.illustration_brief: [NAME] and family arriving at [DESTINATION], taking it all in.

scenes.outline: First, they did [ACTIVITY]. [NAME] loved it. [FAMILY_MEMBER] smiled at [NAME].
Then they had a picnic. They sat on a blanket and ate sandwiches. It was yummy.
scenes.illustration_brief: Family picnic scene, food on a blanket, everyone eating happily.
The special memory moment, highlighted and warm.

scenes.outline: It was time to go home. [NAME] was tired but happy. What a wonderful day!
scenes.illustration_brief: Family leaving [DESTINATION], [NAME] looking tired but content.

scenes.outline: On the way home, [NAME] fell asleep thinking of the day. Family days were the best.
scenes.illustration_brief: [NAME] asleep in the car/on the journey, peaceful expression.

comprehension_questions.retrieval: Where did [NAME] and their family go?
comprehension_questions.inference: Why do you think [NAME] will remember this day?
comprehension_questions.prediction: Where would you like to go with your family?

writing_worksheet.level_1_2: Trace and write: f, m, l, y. Copy the word: family.
writing_worksheet.level_3_4: Write these words from the story: family, together, happy. Write about a day out you had.
writing_worksheet.level_5_6: Write 2 sentences about [NAME]'s family day. What makes time with family special?

dinosaurs.MEMORY: [FAMILY_MEMBER] lifted [NAME] up to see the big dinosaur

space.MEMORY: They saw a shooting star in the sky

unicorns.MEMORY: [NAME] got to brush a white pony's mane

football.MEMORY: [NAME] caught a ball that came into the crowd

animals.MEMORY: An elephant splashed water near them

baking.MEMORY: [NAME] made a biscuit that looked like a star

nature.MEMORY: They saw a deer hiding in the trees
